'''Shakko''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]. He was the captain of the ''[[Cavalcade]]''. [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] killed him and six other pirates when she boarded the ship to find where pieces of art came from.

==Appearances==
*[[Allegiance (novel)|''Allegiance'']] {{Ab|Allegiance (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
